failed_attempts.sql:
SELECT
  p.id AS publication_id,
  p.num_comments
FROM publication p
JOIN profile pr ON p.profile_id = pr.id
WHERE 
  p.description_lexemes @@ to_tsquery('english', 'seafood')
  AND (pr.biography_lexemes @@ to_tsquery('english', 'restaurant'))
ORDER BY p.num_comments DESC
LIMIT 10;
failed_attempts.error:
connection failed: connection to server at "::1", port 5433 failed: could not receive data from server: Connection refused
Multiple connection attempts failed. All failures were:
